response:
<> To replace one URL with another within a string in PHP you can use the str_replace function which is efficient and works for repeating instances of the string as required Here is the code ```php $string = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $oldUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $newUrl = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $replacedString = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $string); echo $replacedString; ``` This will output New post on the site http://yahoo.com/abc1

A palindrome is a word phrase or sequence that reads the same backward as forward for example the word radar or the phrase "madam i m adam" which is a palindrome
